text:
There was once a little girl named Daisy. She lived in an enchanting forest. Every day, Daisy would visit her favorite butterfly bush.

One day, as she sat gazing at the shimmering flowers, sunlight danced through them, creating a mosaic of sparkling colors.

A butterfly touched down on her shoulder.

"Daisy," it buzzed. "You've got such beautiful eyes."

She smiled. "Thank you, flutterby!"

The butterfly let down its wings, revealing a striking pattern. "The sun and the moon?"

"Hey!" Daisy giggled. "Just a simple girl admiring your artistry."

"Not art, but magic!" The butterfly floated off. "Oh, Daisy. Listen closely."

He paused mid-air. "Every time you gaze into those eyes, I see a thousand dreams taking flight."

Daisy tilted her head. "*What kind of dreams?*", she wondered.

The butterfly giggled softly. "*Bright ideas!*

"And someday, you'll write a book
